summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of ORIONIS system completed. Backend APIs fully operational with 100% success rate. Frontend neural interface working perfectly with ORB animations, authentication flow, and responsive design. All core features tested and verified.
passed_tests: Authentication protection on all endpoints (401 unauthorized)
Landing page loads with ORB neural animation
All visual elements rendered correctly (3 orbit rings, 8 particles)
Status panels showing system status and active agents
Login button redirects to Emergent Google OAuth
Page performance: 940ms load, 577ms DOM ready, 288ms first paint
All critical UI elements verified and functional
